title: penstemon azureus var. azureus
intro: Penstemon azureus var. azureus, also known as Rocky Mountain beardtongue, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which help to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant's medicinal properties have also been found to have antioxidant and antimicrobial effects, promoting overall health and well-being. Penstemon azureus var. azureus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used to soothe sore throats, calm digestive issues, and boost the immune system.
